name: VsAccordion
description: A collapsible content panel that shows or hides its content through a toggle interaction.

events.name: update:modelValue
events.description: Emitted when the open state changes

events.name: toggle
events.description: Emitted after toggling; payload is the new open state

slots.name: default
slots.description: Main collapsible content

slots.name: title
slots.description: Content rendered inside the title bar

name: VsAvatar
description: A circular or rounded display element for showing user profile images, initials, or icons.

slots.name: default
slots.description: Avatar content — image, initials, or icon

name: VsBar
description: A full-width horizontal bar component typically used as a header, footer, or toolbar container.

slots.name: default
slots.description: Bar content

name: VsBlock
description: A content block component with an optional title area and a scrollable content region.

slots.name: default
slots.description: Main content of the block

slots.name: title
slots.description: Content rendered in the title header area

name: VsButton
description: A versatile button component supporting multiple visual variants and a built-in loading state.

props.name: circle
props.description: Renders the button as a circle

props.name: loading
props.description: Shows a loading spinner and disables interaction

props.name: responsive
props.description: Stretches button to fill container width

slots.name: default
slots.description: Button label content

name: VsCheckbox
description: A checkbox form input component supporting single and multiple selection modes, with an optional label and validation.

props.name: beforeChange
props.description: Async hook called before value change

props.name: checkLabel
props.description: Label displayed next to the checkbox

events.name: update:modelValue
events.description: Emitted when the value changes

events.name: update:changed
events.description: Emitted when changed state updates

events.name: update:valid
events.description: Emitted when validation state updates

events.name: change
events.description: Emitted on value change

events.name: focus
events.description: Emitted when the checkbox gains focus

events.name: blur
events.description: Emitted when the checkbox loses focus

events.name: toggle
events.description: Emitted after toggling; payload is the new checked state and the mouse event

slots.name: label
slots.description: Custom label content

slots.name: check-label
slots.description: Custom content next to the checkbox

slots.name: messages
slots.description: Custom validation message content

methods.name: validate
methods.description: Triggers validation and returns the result

name: VsChip
description: A compact element for displaying tags, labels, or status indicators with optional icon and close button.

events.name: close
events.description: Emitted when the close button is clicked

slots.name: default
slots.description: Chip label content

slots.name: icon
slots.description: Leading icon displayed before the label

name: VsContainer
description: A layout container component that automatically adjusts its padding when used inside `VsLayout` to accommodate positioned headers, footers, and drawers.

slots.name: default
slots.description: Main content of the container

name: VsDimmed
description: A semi-transparent overlay component that covers its parent container with a fade transition.

events.name: update:modelValue
events.description: Emitted when visibility changes

name: VsDivider
description: A horizontal or vertical line separator used to visually divide content sections.

props.name: responsive
props.description: Switches a vertical divider to horizontal at small container widths

props.name: vertical
props.description: Renders a vertical divider instead of horizontal

name: VsDrawer
description: A slide-in panel component that overlays content from any edge of the screen with optional dimmed backdrop and focus trapping.

props.name: styleSet
props.description: Custom style set for the component

props.name: dimClose
props.description: Close the drawer when the dimmed backdrop is clicked

props.name: dimmed
props.description: Show a dimmed backdrop behind the drawer

props.name: escClose
props.description: Close the drawer when the Escape key is pressed

props.name: focusLock
props.description: Trap focus inside the drawer while it is open

props.name: hideScroll
props.description: Hide the scrollbar inside the drawer

props.name: id
props.description: HTML id attribute for the drawer

props.name: placement
props.description: Edge from which the drawer slides in

props.name: size
props.description: Width (left/right) or height (top/bottom) of the drawer panel. Accepts size tokens (`xs`, `sm`, `md`, `lg`, `xl`) or CSS values

props.name: modelValue
props.description: v-model binding to control open state

events.name: update:modelValue
events.description: Emitted when the open state changes

events.name: open
events.description: Emitted when the drawer opens

events.name: close
events.description: Emitted when the drawer closes

events.name: click-dimmed
events.description: Emitted when the dimmed backdrop is clicked

slots.name: default
slots.description: Main content of the drawer

slots.name: header
slots.description: Header area of the drawer

slots.name: footer
slots.description: Footer area of the drawer

name: VsExpandable
description: A content container with animated expand and collapse transitions controlled by the `open` prop.

props.name: styleSet
props.description: Custom style set for the component

props.name: open
props.description: Controls whether the content is expanded

slots.name: default
slots.description: The content to be shown or hidden

name: VsFileDrop
description: A file input component that supports both drag-and-drop and click-to-browse file selection with validation, multiple file support, and form integration.

props.name: styleSet
props.description: Custom style set for the component

props.name: label
props.description: Label text displayed above the file drop area

props.name: name
props.description: HTML name attribute for the input

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text shown in the drop area

events.name: update:modelValue
events.description: Emitted when the selected files change

events.name: update:changed
events.description: Emitted when files are changed

events.name: update:valid
events.description: Emitted when the validation state changes

events.name: change
events.description: Emitted on file selection change

events.name: drop
events.description: Emitted when files are dropped

events.name: focus
events.description: Emitted when the file drop area gains focus

events.name: blur
events.description: Emitted when the file drop area loses focus

slots.name: default
slots.description: Custom content for the drop area. Receives `{ dragging: boolean }` as slot props

slots.name: label
slots.description: Custom label content

slots.name: messages
slots.description: Custom messages content

methods.name: focus
methods.description: Set focus to the file input

methods.name: blur
methods.description: Remove focus from the file input

methods.name: validate
methods.description: Trigger validation and return the result

name: VsFloating
description: A positioned floating element that renders in a teleport overlay and automatically positions itself relative to a target element with optional animation.

props.name: target
props.description: CSS selector for the target element to position against

props.name: disabled
props.description: Prevent the floating element from showing

props.name: margin
props.description: Gap in pixels between the target and the floating element

props.name: placement
props.description: Preferred placement of the floating element

props.name: followWidth
props.description: Match the floating element width to the target element width

props.name: overlayId
props.description: CSS selector for the teleport container

props.name: modelValue
props.description: v-model binding to show/hide the floating element

events.name: update:modelValue
events.description: Emitted when visibility changes

slots.name: default
slots.description: The floating content. Receives `{ placement: string }` as slot props reflecting the computed placement

name: VsFocusTrap
description: A utility component that traps keyboard focus within its single child element, ensuring accessible modal and overlay interactions.

slots.name: default
slots.description: Must contain exactly one child element that will act as the focus trap boundary

methods.name: focus
methods.description: Move focus into the focus trap anchor

methods.name: blur
methods.description: Return focus to the element that was focused before the trap was activated

name: VsFooter
description: A page footer bar component that supports fixed, sticky, and absolute positioning with layout store integration when used inside `VsLayout`.

props.name: styleSet
props.description: Custom style set for the component

props.name: position
props.description: CSS position value for the footer

props.name: height
props.description: Height of the footer. Defaults to `3rem`

slots.name: default
slots.description: Footer content

name: VsForm
description: A form container component that manages validation state and propagates `disabled`/`readonly` states to all child input components.

props.name: readonly
props.description: Make all child form inputs read-only

events.name: error
events.description: Emitted after `validate()` when the form is invalid. Payload contains the ids of invalid fields

slots.name: default
slots.description: Form content — place Vlossom input components here

methods.name: validate
methods.description: Triggers validation for all child inputs. Returns `Promise<boolean>` indicating whether the form is valid

methods.name: clear
methods.description: Resets all child inputs to their initial state

methods.name: valid
methods.description: Computed property (`ComputedRef<boolean>`) — `true` when all child inputs are valid

methods.name: changed
methods.description: Computed property (`ComputedRef<boolean>`) — `true` when any child input has been changed

name: VsGrid
description: A responsive CSS grid container that supports a configurable number of columns, gap controls, and custom dimensions.

props.name: styleSet
props.description: Custom style set for the component

props.name: gridSize
props.description: Number of grid columns. Default is 12

slots.name: default
slots.description: Grid items

name: VsGroupedList
description: A scrollable list component that renders items with optional grouping, virtual visibility rendering for performance, and full slot customization.

props.name: styleSet
props.description: Custom style set for the component

props.name: groupBy
props.description: Function that returns the group name for each item

props.name: groupOrder
props.description: Order in which groups should appear

events.name: click-item
events.payload: OptionItem & { groupedIndex: number; group: VsGroupedListGroup; groupIndex: number }
events.description: Emitted when an item is clicked

slots.name: header
slots.description: Content for the scrollable list header

slots.name: footer
slots.description: Content for the scrollable list footer

slots.name: group
slots.description: Custom render for a group header. Receives `{ group: string, groupIndex: number, items: OptionItem[] }`

slots.name: item
slots.description: Custom render for an item. Receives the `OptionItem` fields plus `{ groupedIndex, group, groupIndex }`

methods.name: scrollToItem
methods.description: Scroll the list to the item with the given id

methods.name: hasScroll
methods.description: Returns `boolean` — `true` if the list has a scrollbar

name: VsHeader
description: A page header bar component that supports fixed, sticky, and absolute positioning with layout store integration when used inside `VsLayout`.

props.name: styleSet
props.description: Custom style set for the component

props.name: position
props.description: CSS position value for the header

props.name: height
props.description: Height of the header. Defaults to `3rem`

slots.name: default
slots.description: Header content

name: VsImage
description: A component for displaying images with support for lazy loading, fallback images, and a skeleton placeholder while loading.

props.name: styleSet
props.description: Custom style set for the component.

props.name: alt
props.description: Alt text for the image element.

props.name: fallback
props.description: Fallback image URL shown when the primary src fails.

props.name: lazy
props.description: Enables lazy loading using the Intersection Observer.

props.name: noSkeleton
props.description: Disables the skeleton placeholder during loading.

props.name: src
props.description: The source URL of the image.

events.name: error
events.description: Emitted when the image fails to load.

slots.name: skeleton
slots.description: Custom content displayed inside the skeleton state.

name: VsIndexView
description: A container component that shows only the child element at the current index, with optional keep-alive support.

props.name: modelValue
props.description: The index of the currently displayed child (v-model).

props.name: keepAlive
props.description: Wraps children in `<KeepAlive>` to preserve their state.

props.name: width
props.description: Width of the component (responsive breakpoints allowed).

props.name: grid
props.description: Grid column span for layout (responsive breakpoints).

events.name: update:modelValue
events.description: Emitted when the displayed index changes.

slots.name: default
slots.description: Child elements to switch between by index.

name: VsInnerScroll
description: A layout component that provides a scrollable content area with optional sticky header and footer sections.

props.name: styleSet
props.description: Custom style set for the component.

props.name: hideScroll
props.description: Hides the scrollbar while keeping scrollability.

slots.name: default
slots.description: Scrollable content area.

slots.name: header
slots.description: Sticky header displayed above the scroll area.

slots.name: footer
slots.description: Sticky footer displayed below the scroll area.

methods.name: hasScroll
methods.description: Returns `true` if the content overflows the container.

name: VsInput
description: A feature-rich text input component with validation, clear button, prepend/append slots, and form integration.

props.name: styleSet
props.description: Custom style set for the component.

props.name: label
props.description: Label text displayed above the input.

props.name: required
props.description: Marks the field as required (adds validation).

props.name: id
props.description: The `id` attribute for the input element.

props.name: name
props.description: The `name` attribute for the input element.

props.name: messages
props.description: External messages (state + text) to display below the input.

props.name: min
props.description: Minimum value (number type) or minimum length (text type).

props.name: max
props.description: Maximum value (number type) or maximum length (text type).

props.name: changed
props.description: v-model binding that reflects whether the value has changed.

props.name: valid
props.description: v-model binding that reflects the current validation state.

events.name: update:modelValue
events.description: Emitted when the input value changes.

events.name: update:changed
events.description: Emitted when the changed state updates.

events.name: update:valid
events.description: Emitted when the validation state updates.

events.name: change
events.description: Emitted after the value is committed.

events.name: focus
events.description: Emitted when the input receives focus.

events.name: blur
events.description: Emitted when the input loses focus.

slots.name: label
slots.description: Custom label content replacing the default label.

slots.name: prepend
slots.description: Content displayed to the left inside the input box.

slots.name: append
slots.description: Content displayed to the right inside the input box.

slots.name: messages
slots.description: Custom messages content below the input.

methods.name: validate
methods.description: Triggers validation and returns the result.

methods.name: select
methods.description: Selects all text in the input element.

name: VsInputWrapper
description: A layout wrapper for form inputs that provides a label, validation messages area, and responsive layout support.

props.name: styleSet
props.description: Custom style set for the component.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Applies disabled styling to the label and messages.

props.name: id
props.description: The `id` linked to the label's `for` attribute.

props.name: label
props.description: Label text displayed above the input.

props.name: required
props.description: Shows a required star (*) indicator next to the label.

props.name: groupLabel
props.description: Renders the wrapper as `fieldset`/`legend` for grouped inputs.

props.name: messages
props.description: Array of state+text messages displayed below the input.

props.name: shake
props.description: Triggers a horizontal shake animation (e.g., on validation failure).

slots.name: default
slots.description: The form input or content to wrap.

slots.name: label
slots.description: Custom label content replacing the default label text.

slots.name: messages
slots.description: Custom messages content replacing the default messages.

name: VsLabelValue
description: A two-column display component that pairs a label cell with a value cell, useful for detail views and data tables.

props.name: styleSet
props.description: Custom style set for the component.

props.name: dense
props.description: Reduces padding and font size for compact display.

props.name: primary
props.description: Applies primary color scheme to the label cell.

props.name: vertical
props.description: Stacks label and value cells vertically.

props.name: responsive
props.description: Automatically switches to vertical layout in narrow containers.

slots.name: default
slots.description: The value cell content.

slots.name: label
slots.description: The label cell content.

name: VsLayout
description: A root layout container that provides the layout store context required by `VsHeader`, `VsFooter`, and other layout-aware components.

slots.name: default
slots.description: The content to render inside the layout.

name: VsLoading
description: An animated loading indicator composed of five vertical bars with a wave animation.

props.name: colorScheme
props.description: Color scheme for the loading bars.

props.name: styleSet
props.description: Custom style set for the component.

name: VsMessage
description: A small message display component that shows an icon and text for different UI states: idle, info, success, warning, and error.

props.name: styleSet
props.description: Custom style set for the component.

props.name: state
props.description: The UI state that determines the icon and color.

name: VsModal
description: A modal dialog component that renders content in an overlay layer via the Vlossom modal plugin.

props.name: styleSet
props.description: Custom style set for the modal node.

props.name: modelValue
props.description: Controls the visibility of the modal (v-model).

props.name: container
props.description: CSS selector of the element to teleport the modal into.

props.name: escClose
props.description: Closes the modal when the ESC key is pressed.

props.name: size
props.type: 'xs' | 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg' | 'xl' | string | number | { width?: SizeProp; height?: SizeProp }
props.description: Modal size as a predefined keyword or custom width/height.

props.name: dimClose
props.description: Closes the modal when clicking the dimmed area.

props.name: dimmed
props.description: Shows a dimmed overlay behind the modal.

props.name: focusLock
props.description: Traps focus within the modal while it is open.

props.name: hideScroll
props.description: Hides the scroll on the container when the modal is open.

props.name: id
props.description: Custom ID for the modal overlay instance.

events.name: update:modelValue
events.description: Emitted when the modal open state changes.

events.name: open
events.description: Emitted when the modal opens.

events.name: close
events.description: Emitted when the modal closes.

slots.name: default
slots.description: The content rendered inside the modal dialog.

name: VsPage
description: A layout component that provides a structured page container with title, description, and content areas.

props.name: styleSet
props.description: Custom style set for the component

slots.name: default
slots.description: Main content area

slots.name: title
slots.description: Page title area (optional)

slots.name: description
slots.description: Page description area (optional)

name: VsPagination
description: A pagination component that allows navigation through a series of pages.

props.name: styleSet
props.description: Custom style set for the component

props.name: edgeButtons
props.description: Shows first and last page navigation buttons

props.name: length
props.description: Total number of pages (must be greater than 0)

props.name: showingLength
props.description: Number of page buttons to display at once

events.name: update:modelValue
events.description: Emitted when the current page changes

events.name: change
events.description: Emitted when the current page changes

slots.name: first

slots.name: last
slots.description: Custom icon for the "last page" button

slots.name: prev
slots.description: Custom icon for the "prev page" button

slots.name: next
slots.description: Custom icon for the "next page" button

slots.name: page
slots.description: Custom content for each page button; receives `{ page: number }`

name: VsProgress

props.description: Custom style set for the component

props.description: Maximum value of the progress bar (must be > 0)

props.description: Current value of the progress bar (must be >= 0)

props.description: Text label displayed over the progress bar

events.description: Emitted when the selected value changes

events.name: blur
events.description: Emitted when the radio loses focus

name: VsSearchInput

props.description: Custom style set for the component

events.description: Emitted when the search text changes

events.description: Emitted when the case-sensitive toggle changes

events.description: Emitted when the regex toggle changes

name: VsSelect

events.name: update:changed
events.description: Emitted when the changed state updates

name: VsTable

props.name: pageSize
props.description: Number of rows per page, v-model

props.name: totalItems
props.description: All items for server mode, v-model

events.description: Emitted when a cell is clicked

events.description: Emitted when a row is selected

events.name: expand-row
events.description: Emitted when a row is expanded

events.description: Emitted on search

events.description: Emitted when page changes

events.name: update:selectedItems
events.description: Emitted when selected rows change

events.name: update:page
events.description: Emitted when the current page changes

events.name: update:pageSize
events.description: Emitted when the page size changes

events.name: update:pagedItems
events.description: Emitted when paged items update

events.name: update:totalItems
events.description: Emitted when total items update

slots.name: caption
slots.description: Table caption content

slots.name: header-[key]
slots.description: Custom header cell for a specific column key

slots.name: body-[key]
slots.description: Custom body cell for a specific column key

slots.name: select
slots.description: Custom content for the selection column cell

slots.name: expand
slots.description: Custom content for the expanded row panel

name: VsTabs
description: A tab navigation component with animated indicator, scroll buttons, and vertical layout support.

props.name: styleSet
props.description: Custom style set for the component

props.name: modelValue
props.description: Index of the active tab, v-model

events.name: update:modelValue
events.description: Emitted when the active tab index changes

events.name: change
events.description: Emitted when the selected tab changes

slots.name: tab
slots.description: Custom tab item content. Receives `{ tab: string, index: number }`

name: VsTextWrap
description: A container component that wraps text content and provides copy-to-clipboard and external link action buttons.

props.name: styleSet
props.description: Custom style set for the component

props.name: link
props.description: URL to open in a new tab when the link button is clicked

events.name: copied
events.description: Emitted when text is successfully copied to the clipboard

slots.name: default
slots.description: Main text content to display

slots.name: actions
slots.description: Additional action buttons displayed before the copy/link buttons

name: VsTextarea
description: A multi-line text input component with validation, string modifiers, and min/max length constraints.

props.name: styleSet
props.description: Custom style set for the component

events.name: update:modelValue
events.description: Emitted when the value changes

events.name: update:changed
events.description: Emitted when the changed state updates

events.name: update:valid
events.description: Emitted when the valid state updates

events.name: change
events.description: Emitted on value change

events.name: focus
events.description: Emitted on focus

events.name: blur
events.description: Emitted on blur

slots.name: label
slots.description: Custom label content

slots.name: messages
slots.description: Custom message content

methods.name: select
methods.description: Selects all text in the textarea

name: VsThemeButton
description: A toggle button that switches the application between light and dark themes.

props.name: styleSet
props.description: Custom style set for the component

props.name: circle
props.description: Renders the button as a circle

events.name: change
events.description: Emitted when the theme changes. Payload is `true` for dark mode

name: VsToast
description: A toast notification component with auto-close, hover pause, and a close button.

props.name: styleSet
props.description: Custom style set for the component

props.name: primary
props.description: Applies primary color to the toast

events.name: close
events.description: Emitted when the toast should be closed (auto-close or close button click)

slots.name: default
slots.description: Toast message content

name: VsToggle
description: A stateful button that toggles between active and inactive states, wrapping `VsButton`.

props.name: styleSet
props.description: Custom style set for the component

props.name: circle
props.description: Renders the button as a circle

events.name: update:modelValue
events.description: Emitted when the toggled state changes

events.name: toggle
events.description: Emitted on every toggle with the new state

slots.name: default
slots.description: Button content

name: VsTooltip
description: A floating tooltip component that attaches to a target element and supports hover, click, and keyboard interactions.

props.name: styleSet
props.description: Custom style set for the component

props.name: target
props.description: CSS selector of the trigger element

props.name: align
props.description: Alignment of the tooltip relative to the target (`start`, `center`, `end`)

props.name: clickable
props.description: Requires a click on the target to open

props.name: contentsHover
props.description: Keeps the tooltip open while hovering its contents

props.name: escClose
props.description: Closes the tooltip when Escape is pressed

props.name: margin
props.description: Gap (px) between the target and the tooltip

slots.name: default
slots.description: Tooltip content

name: VsVisibleRender
description: A container component that uses IntersectionObserver to track child element visibility and optimize rendering performance.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables intersection observation; all children are visible

props.name: height
props.description: Creates an internal scrollable container of the given height

props.name: rootMargin
props.description: Margin around the root for intersection calculation

props.name: selector
props.description: CSS selector to find the scroll container element within the component

props.name: tag
props.description: HTML tag for the container element

slots.name: default
slots.description: Child elements to be observed

methods.name: scrollToElement
methods.description: Scrolls the container so the given element is visible
